# Assumptions & Risks

Living register in table form. Status: `untested` | `partial` | `verified` | `accepted`.

| # | Assumption | Load-bearing? | Status | How we'd test it / what we found |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| R1 | The team wants a mid-pipeline checkpoint more than a faster end-of-run report. | Yes | partial | Desk-confirmed by early notes; not yet observed in the real flow. |
| R2 | A checkpoint is read only if it's one glance, not a document. | No | untested | Test in a prototype round. |
